description_long: This is a classic single-propeller military-style airplane with a streamlined fuselage and elliptical wings, reminiscent of World War II fighter aircraft such as the Supermarine Spitfire. The body is painted in a metallic green with yellow-tipped wings and tail, and features blue floral or insignia-like markings on the wings and fuselage. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a clear canopy. The landing gear is visible and consists of two main wheels and a smaller tail wheel, indicating a taildragger configuration. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the tail section features a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers in a conventional arrangement.
description: A green, single-propeller, WWII-era fighter airplane with yellow-tipped elliptical wings, blue insignia, and a classic taildragger landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the elliptical wingspan, nose-mounted propeller, and narrow fuselage profile.
description_view_1: Angled top-left view highlighting the cockpit canopy, blue wing markings, and yellow-tipped wings and tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taildragger landing gear, single vertical stabilizer, and full wingspan.
description_view_3: Angled top-right view showing the propeller, cockpit, and detailed markings on the wings and fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, elliptical wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed gear and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
